image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Imagine a bay lighting up like a starry night sky.
Context visual: This incredible display is caused by tiny organisms called dinoflagellates.
Escalation visual: When disturbed, they produce a brilliant blue light, creating a living light show.
Evidence visual: This phenomenon is most famous in places like Mosquito Bay in Vieques.
Payoff visual: But remember, these ecosystems are fragile and need our protection.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about our oceans? Follow for more insights on marine life!
